sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"> <sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <access>public</access> <active>true</active> <api_name>global.sleepy</api_name> <caller_access/> <client_callable>false</client_callable> <description/> <name>sleepy</name> <script><![CDATA[function sleepy(time){ gs.sleep(time); }]]></script> <sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2024-06-25 17:49:52</sys_created_on> <sys_id>9f19a5c1fb0b8e509462f9f66eefdcda</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>sleepy</sys_name> <sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_script_include_9f19a5c1fb0b8e509462f9f66eefdcda</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2024-06-25 17:49:52</sys_updated_on> </sys_script_include> </record_update>
